sources_used: The Cutting Room Floor - Dragon Spirit: The New Legend
notes: T3 tier game with limited audio documentation. Sources mention sound design credits but contain no specific tempo, key, chord progression, or detailed SFX characteristic data. The Cutting Room Floor article documents game mechanics, regional differences, and development but lacks musical parameters. Wikipedia article references original arcade Dragon Spirit (1987) composer Shinji Hosoe but NES version (1990) has different sound designer listed as Bourgeois Kiyoshi.
